category_definitions.base_character_substitution: Levenshtein substitution not involving a mark, virama, punctuation, or digit
category_definitions.diacritic_or_vowel_sign_error: Edit involving Telugu dependent vowel or combining sign
category_definitions.missing_output: OCR returned no normalized Telugu text
